title: Garden Tool Set with Wood Handle Trowel,Garden Hand Tools Kit Gifts for Women & Men,Succulent Plant Transplant Trowel Set,Includes Narrow Shovel,Wide Shovel and Rake-Essential Garden Tools
features: GARDENING TOOL SET: Large Gardening Hand Tool Set Includes 3 Gardening Planting Tools: 1 Narrow Shovel,1 Wide Shovel and 1 Garden rake Tools Set

HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: Large Shovel, Soil Plow Fork And Rake Is Exquisite Iron Crafts, Handle Made Of Sturdy Wood Is Convenient For Gardening,all Of Them Are Durable and No Rust Even After Repeated Use.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN: Gardening Tool Set, Made Of High-quality Wood Materials, Can Reduce The Pressure On Wrists And Hands, Or Relieve The Pain And Fatigue Of Hands When Digging, Weeding, Etc. Twenty Years Of Focus On Horticultural Design

WIDE RANGE OF USES: Succlent Garden Tools Are Suitable For Your Various Gardening Needs, Such As Watering, Weeding, Digging, Transplanting, Pruning, Loosening Soil, Hydroponics Growing Etc. The Large Garden Tools Kit Is Especially Good For Office Gardening, Desk Gardening And Indoor Bonsai,helpful For Your Cute Succulent Plants.

WONDERFUL GARDENING GIFY: Your Gardening Lovers Like Wife, Husbands, Parents And Elder Will Greatly Appreciate To Get This Wonderful Gardening Tool On Their Christmas Day, New Years, Anniversary Day, Birthday Or Another Important Days.
